name: chat-short-cpu-calib
description: Scenario B / I3 SLO-calibration probe: chat-short-cpu's distributions and 0.08 rps rate, but a 12-request stop and a DIFFERENT seed (2003001) so the scenario SLO (evidence/i3/raw/slo/) is derived from measured maxima of a schedule that is not the measured runs' own schedule. Runs via the gateway against a freshly started llama-server; also serves as the warm-up that pages the model into the OS cache before the measured arms.
